title: Ruler (gamer)
extract: Park Jae-hyuk, better known as Ruler, is a South Korean professional League of Legends player for Gen.G. Throughout his career, he has won two League of Legends Champions Korea (LCK) titles, two League of Legends Pro League (LPL) titles, two Mid-Season Invitational (MSI) titles, and one World Championship title. He is considered one of the greatest marksman players of all time.
